key_insight: TorchNEP makes NEP training over 100× faster while improving accuracy mainly through a two-stage training protocol rather than the optimizer alone.
engineering_relevance: It enables practical, scalable development of machine-learned interatomic potentials for large atomistic systems in materials discovery and simulation workflows.
method: PyTorch-based NEP implementation with analytically derived gradients
Adaptive optimization combined with a two-stage training strategy
Maintains compatibility with existing NEP models
evidence_signal: Across multiple benchmark datasets and elemental/alloy systems, TorchNEP improved force and stress predictions and maintained comparable or better energy accuracy.
watch_item: Higher model complexity can reduce training error without improving predictive performance, so architecture scaling should be validated carefully.
paper_title: TorchNEP: Ultra-Efficient and Accurate Training of Neuroevolution Potentials
